title: Add deterministic custom scorer registry
description:
Add deterministic custom scorer registry

Create a registry for deterministic business outcome scorers.

Scope:

* Add `src/evaluation/scorers/`.
* Define scorer metadata: scorer_ref, source hash, input schema, output metric keys, metric_family, deterministic aggregation semantics.
* Keep boundary clear: scorers are deterministic outcome aggregations; `src/evaluation/judges/` remains LLM-as-judge diagnostics/reward-model support.
* Add resolver used by adapters and spec translation.

Acceptance criteria:

* Registry can resolve a scorer by stable ref.
* Source hash is available for HEM provenance.
* Tests cover missing/unknown scorer refs.
